patch:
--- a/adder_8bit.v
+++ b/adder_8bit.v
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@
   input [7:0] operand_a,
   input [7:0] operand_b,
   input carry_in,
-  always @(operand_a) begin
+  always @(operand_a or operand_b or carry_in) begin
     {carry_out, sum} = operand_a + operand_b + carry_in;
   end
before_code:
module adder_8bit (
  input clk,
  input [7:0] operand_a,
  input [7:0] operand_b,
  input carry_in,
  output reg carry_out,
  output reg [7:0] sum
);

  always @(operand_a) begin
    {carry_out, sum} = operand_a + operand_b + carry_in;
  end

endmodule
after_code:
module adder_8bit (
  input clk,
  input [7:0] operand_a,
  input [7:0] operand_b,
  input carry_in,
  output reg carry_out,
  output reg [7:0] sum
);

  always @(operand_a or operand_b or carry_in) begin
    {carry_out, sum} = operand_a + operand_b + carry_in;
  end

endmodule
